title: Threat Meets Momentum
theme: a push and a threat resolve on the same jump
learningGoal: combine a borrowed launch with a timed danger on one commitment
mentalModel: the jump is the single moment where your momentum and the hazard rhythm must agree
misconceptions: a spring lets you ignore the beam
two systems can always be solved one at a time
subversion: the launch that clears the beam is the launch that overshoots into the next hazard
optimizationFocus: the single jump that satisfies the launch and the beat at once
finalExam: clear a launched gap guarded by two desynchronised hazards on one jump
